notes: Legal review = pass. Two new claim_register entries seeded: rate-limit protection (60 req/min per install-token) + session expiry (7 days). Rolling constraints: any future 'we rate-limit at N req/min' copy must cite rate_limiter.get_config(); any future session-length copy must cite [session].expiry_days. Signoff to CEO.
